description: Hierarchical taxonomy of FSM use cases relevant to electric/gas/water utilities

sub_domains.name: Work Order Lifecycle Management
sub_domains.description: End-to-end management of field work orders from creation through completion and billing

sub_topics.name: Work Order Creation
sub_topics.description: Generating work orders from multiple sources: customer calls, AMI alerts, SCADA alarms, scheduled maintenance

sub_topics.name: Crew Dispatch
sub_topics.description: Assignment of work orders to available crews based on skill, location, and priority

sub_topics.name: Work Order Completion
sub_topics.description: Field confirmation, job notes capture, and closure workflows with photo/document attachment

sub_topics.name: SLA Tracking
sub_topics.description: Monitoring adherence to regulatory response time commitments (SAIDI/SAIFI targets, GO 165 deadlines)

sub_topics.name: Work Order Prioritization
sub_topics.description: Dynamic re-prioritization based on outage impact, customer class, and regulatory reporting requirements

sub_domains.name: Crew Scheduling and Dispatch Optimization
sub_domains.description: AI/ML-driven optimization of crew schedules to minimize drive time, maximize utilization, and honor SLAs

sub_topics.name: Automated Scheduling
sub_topics.description: Rule-based and ML-driven automatic scheduling of field work to available crews

sub_topics.name: Dynamic Re-routing
sub_topics.description: Real-time re-assignment of crews during the day based on new priority work, cancellations, or crew delays

sub_topics.name: Crew Skill Matching
sub_topics.description: Matching work order skill requirements (e.g., line voltage level, NERC CIP access) to certified crew

sub_topics.name: Travel Time Optimization
sub_topics.description: Minimizing drive time using GIS-aware routing and traffic data integration

sub_domains.name: Mobile Field Worker Application
sub_domains.description: Mobile app capabilities for field crew to receive, complete, and document work orders in the field

sub_topics.name: Offline Capability
sub_topics.description: Full work order access and completion when crew is in areas with no cellular coverage

sub_topics.name: Asset Context
sub_topics.description: Displaying relevant asset history, drawings, and GIS location data on the technician's mobile device

sub_topics.name: Safety Compliance
sub_topics.description: Digital safety tailboard, JSA (Job Safety Analysis), and LOTO (Lock Out Tag Out) workflow enforcement in the mobile app

sub_topics.name: Photo and Document Capture
sub_topics.description: Field capture of completion photos, meter readings, and customer signatures on mobile devices

sub_domains.name: Asset Inspection and Maintenance
sub_domains.description: Planned and predictive maintenance workflows for T&D infrastructure assets

sub_topics.name: Preventive Maintenance Scheduling
sub_topics.description: Generating work orders on fixed intervals or usage-based triggers for equipment PM

sub_topics.name: Inspection Route Optimization
sub_topics.description: Optimizing field inspection routes for pole inspections, substation checks, and line patrols per GO 165 cycles

sub_topics.name: Condition-Based Maintenance
sub_topics.description: Using sensor data (PI historian, AMI) to trigger work orders based on asset health indicators

sub_topics.name: Defect Tracking
sub_topics.description: Recording and prioritizing infrastructure defects found during inspections for corrective maintenance

sub_domains.name: Outage Response Workflow
sub_domains.description: Coordinating field response to unplanned outages from initial call through restoration

sub_topics.name: Outage Work Order Generation
sub_topics.description: Automatic creation of trouble orders from OMS-detected outage events

sub_topics.name: Storm Crew Surge Management
sub_topics.description: Rapid scaling to mutual aid and contract crew during major storm events

sub_topics.name: Restoration Coordination
sub_topics.description: Sequencing repair crews to maximize customers restored per hour during multi-outage events

sub_topics.name: Customer Notification Integration
sub_topics.description: Triggering automated customer ETR (estimated time of restoration) notifications from FSM events

sub_domains.name: Third-Party Contractor Management
sub_domains.description: Managing external contractor crews within the FSM platform for augmentation and specialized work

sub_topics.name: Contractor Onboarding
sub_topics.description: Digital credential, certification, and insurance verification for contract crews

sub_topics.name: Contractor Work Order Assignment
sub_topics.description: Extending WO assignment and completion workflows to contractor crews with data sovereignty controls

sub_topics.name: Contractor Performance Tracking
sub_topics.description: Measuring contractor SLA compliance, quality defects, and cost per task

sub_domains.name: GIS Integration
sub_domains.description: Bidirectional integration between FSM and GIS for asset location, routing, and outage visualization

sub_topics.name: Asset Location from GIS
sub_topics.description: Pulling asset geographic coordinates and network model from GIS into work order context

sub_topics.name: Field Work Geo-coding
sub_topics.description: Capturing GPS coordinates of completed work and writing back to GIS asset records

sub_topics.name: Outage Polygon Visualization
sub_topics.description: Displaying active outage boundaries on dispatcher and field crew maps

sub_domains.name: Parts and Materials Management
sub_domains.description: Stocking, requesting, and consuming materials and parts through the field work order process

sub_topics.name: Parts Request from Work Order
sub_topics.description: Field crew requesting specific materials directly from the FSM mobile app with ERP integration

sub_topics.name: Truck Stock Management
sub_topics.description: Maintaining and reconciling inventory on field service vehicles

sub_topics.name: Bill of Materials Integration
sub_topics.description: Linking standard job plans to required BOM for accurate materials forecasting

sub_domains.name: Fleet and Vehicle Management
sub_domains.description: Tracking, maintaining, and optimizing the field crew vehicle fleet

sub_topics.name: Vehicle GPS Tracking
sub_topics.description: Real-time vehicle location for dispatch visibility and driver safety

sub_topics.name: Vehicle PM Scheduling
sub_topics.description: Preventive maintenance scheduling for fleet vehicles integrated with work order system

sub_domains.name: Safety and Compliance Workflow
sub_domains.description: Embedding safety procedures and regulatory compliance into the field work execution flow

sub_topics.name: Digital Safety Tailboard
sub_topics.description: Pre-job safety briefing captured digitally on mobile device before work begins

sub_topics.name: NERC CIP Field Access Controls
sub_topics.description: Enforcing NERC CIP-006 physical access controls through work order authorization workflows

sub_topics.name: Incident Reporting Integration
sub_topics.description: Capturing near-miss and OSHA recordable incidents from field mobile app

sub_domains.name: Regulatory Reporting
sub_domains.description: Generating regulatory performance reports from FSM data for CPUC, NERC, FERC, and state PUCs

sub_topics.name: SAIDI/SAIFI Reporting
sub_topics.description: Calculating and reporting annual reliability indices from outage and restoration event data

sub_topics.name: GO 165 Compliance Reporting
sub_topics.description: Tracking and reporting CPUC General Order 165 inspection cycle completion rates

sub_topics.name: Major Event Day (MED) Reporting
sub_topics.description: Identifying and reporting storm events qualifying as Major Event Days per IEEE 1366 standard
